action.reasoning:
Observation: The training run failed after 1155s (~19min). The stderr shows rank 3 exited with code 1 but no traceback. The previous best.pt at 21.17% Quickdraw is intact. I have 9.4h, 15 iters left.

Analysis: I likely consumed time but produced no improvement. I need to: (1) figure out what failed, (2) get a working training run going. The error message lacks a traceback. It might have been an OOM or argument issue. Looking at the last command: I ran with `--backbone vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai`. Let me check what command was actually run by viewing the most recent training metrics. Since I have logs/iter_11/metrics.jsonl from prior successful run, I can verify. Let me just re-launch with simpler safer args and resume from best.pt.

Decision: Run a clean training resuming from best.pt with the correct backbone, fewer epochs to be safe (4), to push above 21.17%. Use full data.
